mapper.sql: id, ent_time, acc_time, province_id, city_id, scene_id, stay_one, stay_two, stay_three, stay_four, stay_five, stay_six, stay_seven, stay_eight, stay_avg
mapper.select:
SELECT sum( a.stay_one ) '1天', sum( a.stay_two ) '2天', sum( a.stay_three ) '3天', sum( a.stay_four ) '4天', sum( a.stay_five ) '5天', sum(a.stay_six) '6天', sum(a.stay_seven) '7天', sum(a.stay_eight) '8天', b.scenic_name FROM tourist_stay_scenic_month a left join base_scenic b on a.scene_id=b.id
a.province_id = 081
and a.acc_time =#{accTime}
group by a.scene_id

SELECT sum( a.stay_one ) '1天', sum( a.stay_two ) '2天', sum( a.stay_three ) '3天', sum( a.stay_four ) '4天', sum( a.stay_five ) '5天', sum(a.stay_six) '6天', sum(a.stay_seven) '7天', sum(a.stay_eight) '8天', b.scenic_name FROM tourist_stay_scenic_month a left join base_scenic b on a.scene_id=b.id
a.province_id != 081
and a.acc_time =#{accTime}
group by a.scene_id
